videos.title: I Extinguished ALL THEIR LANDS  Against the Odds
videos.description:
Wizards never printed good land destruction in Standard. But in Edge of Eternities, they made the mistake of unleashing Extinguisher Battleship on the format, which means it's time to blow up all the lands!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/against-the-odds-i-extinguished-all-their-lands-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7263972#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/neHpl
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/Z9sQp
